description: EN-007 compliance capture hook (P3). Wires scripts/compliance-checkout.mjs to run at an agent run's start: it checks out the MC task(s) — or AUTO-CREATES one when none is supplied (MC_TASK_TITLE + MC_BUCKET) — and stamps the PR body with one 'MC-Checkout: <id>' per task so the gate resolves the agent + tasks (multi-task PRs supported). DISABLED by default (operator-local tooling; governance: ships disabled, opt-in). To enable: merge this entry into .cursor/hooks.json and set COMPLIANCE_CAPTURE=1 plus MC_BASE_URL / MC_ACCOUNTABLE / MC_REPO and either MC_TASK_ID (comma/space-separated for N tasks) or MC_TASK_TITLE + MC_BUCKET to auto-create. checkout/tasks are session-gated, so set MC_BASIC_AUTH ('user:pass') against a gated instance.
